keyword: automatic pet feeder wet and dry food
title: Automatic Pet Feeder for Wet AND Dry Food
meta: Feeders that handle both food types — a harder problem than it sounds.
intro: Most auto-feeders do dry only. Combining wet requires a cooled compartment plus a dry hopper; few do both well.

sections.body: Look for a refrigerated wet bay + a dry hopper if you feed both.
Dual feeders cost more; a single wet-only + manual dry may be cheaper.
Ensure both bays run independent schedules.

products.name: Wet + Dry Pet Feeder
products.asin_query: automatic pet feeder wet and dry

products.name: Split Meal Pet Feeder
products.asin_query: split meal wet dry pet feeder

faq.a: Wet needs cooling, dry needs a hopper; combining is engineering-heavy.

faq.q: Is manual dry + auto wet OK?
